context-param.description: Maximum Visit Number allowed for worker
id for departments of services separated by ','
if this parameter 1 this items by branch or 0 this items independ. by branch or store or 2 this item by store
Path to save web clients XML files
ID for Departments Root in Table Project
1 for show - 0 for hide to control if comment type drop down list being displayed or not
Id for department has previlige to view all departments in appointments reports
If with call center 1 if not 0
Server continaing voice record for call center
